'''Barundi''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Barundi (species)|Barundi]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The natives of Barundi were taken from their homeworld thousand of years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and were deposited on an unnamed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. There, they worshiped the [[Yavin Vassilika]].

{{Planet-stub}}
